findings.description: MVP Constraints and Assumptions section has only 1 item — should have ≥2 with 'Risk if wrong'
findings.fix_applied: Added assumption: 'Assume single-applicant only for MVP — Risk: joint applications require separate data model and consent flow'
Amended to '100K applications/year at launch, scaling to 1M within 24 months'
